para_trans: Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Road
Reference: - 1. General Administration Department, Government Order No. 1322 / Q. No. 2 / Work. 14, D. 20.05.2022.
General Administration Department, Government Order No. Ups 1325 / P.No.102 / Prs-1, D. 08.12.2025,
Smt. Savita Ajit Jawale, Deputy Secretary, Agriculture, Animal Husbandry, Dairying Development and Fisheries

The Department under Reference No. 1 Promoted to the post of Deputy Secretary by order hereunder and appointed as Deputy Secretary in the Office of the Chief Commissioner, State Information Commission on deputation for a period of 2 years.
2. Then Reference No. 2 Under the orders herein, Mrs. Jawale was appointed to the post of deputation.

d. 20.05.2024 He was replaced by a Sub-Inspector or an officer of the Ministry's Deputy Secretary cadre who was given an extension until the position became available in the Ministry due to his retirement.
3. Now under this order Smt. Savita Ajit Jawale, Deputy Secretary to the Chief Commissioner, State Information

The services of the deputation to the Commission Office are being terminated and they are being transferred from the post of deputation to the post of Deputy Secretary in the Planning Department on repatriation.
4. Smt. Jawale, Deputy Secretary should join the Planning Department immediately.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
